ogTitle: Marryatville vs Maslin Beach: Climate Safety

heading: Marryatville vs Maslin Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marryatville, South Australia and Maslin Beach, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marryatville has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Maslin Beach (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marryatville or Maslin Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marryatville has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Maslin Beach scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marryatville scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Maslin Beach scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marryatville or Maslin Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marryatville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
